rationale: US reducing NATO Europe assets remains the key fresh signal for Poland's security; Iran deal progress offers mild energy price relief, but no new qualitative escalation this cycle.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets for NATO Europe
top_events.summary: Continuation of last cycle's news — no new details this cycle. US reducing NATO Europe presence remains a concrete security concern for Poland on Russia's flank, but no qualitative escalation beyond known baseline.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported closer than ever
top_events.summary: Progress on a US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could ease global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Polish households still sensitive to gas and electricity costs.

top_events.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
top_events.summary: SpaceX Nasdaq debut is a major financial market event with limited direct impact on Poland; minor indirect effect via global investor sentiment and EU tech ecosystem.
